subscription.cancelPlanNoticeWithLabel: Cancels the {{planLabel}} plan right away. Your card won't be charged the {{planLabel}} due {{date}}. This can't be undone.
subscription.cancelPlanNotice: Cancels this plan right away. This can't be undone.
subscription.multipleActive: You have {{count}} active subscriptions. You're likely being charged twice — cancel the one you don't want to keep.
subscription.appleManageNotice: Manage or cancel this subscription in your Apple Account settings: open Settings on your iPhone or iPad, tap your name, then Subscriptions.
subscription.pausedNotice: You won't be charged while paused. Your subscription resumes on {{date}} at {{plan}}. While paused, paid features are off and everything you've made is saved.
subscription.managedThroughStripe: Your subscription is managed through your Stripe account at

pauseCard.pauseInstead: Pause instead — no charge while you're away
pauseCard.notice: Taking a break between terms? Pause your subscription instead of cancelling. You won't be charged while it's paused, and it resumes on its own when you're ready. Everything you've made is saved.
pauseCard.resumesLine: Resumes {{date}} at {{plan}}. Cancel anytime before then.

accountDeletion.warning: All your data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

claimSubscription.sent: Sent. Check that inbox for a confirmation link.
claimSubscription.description: If you paid Stripe with another email address, enter it here. We'll send a confirmation link to that address to attach the subscription to this account.
claimSubscription.error: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

logOutEverywhere.notice: Lost a device? Log out everywhere to end every session, including this one. Sign back in to continue.

checkout.startUsingPrefix: To start using your new features, log in or create an account with the
checkout.usedDifferentEmail: Used a different email for payment?
checkout.linkEmailsPrefix: You can link payment and login emails from your
checkout.existingUserBody: Log in with the email address associated with your payment.
checkout.newUserBody: Create an account using the same email address used for your payment.
checkout.timeoutBefore: We're still processing your subscription activation. If you're already logged in, you can try visiting the
checkout.timeoutAfter: directly, or refresh this page to check again.
checkout.activatingSubscription: We're activating your subscription. This usually takes just a few seconds.
checkout.autoRedirect: You'll be automatically redirected once your subscription is active.

verifyEmail.message: Check your inbox — confirm your email to secure your account.

createAccount.headline: Keep your next decks
createAccount.body: With a free account, every deck you convert is saved to your downloads history — re-download any of them later.

accessBanner.active: {{passLabel}} active — expires {{date}}. Convert as much as you want.
accessBanner.endsIn: {{passLabel}} ends in {{time}} — finish any pending conversions.
